TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chad Chad i Africa a kanatal, u bunak amin i labu nu kanatal, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatayay a balucu' i Africa". inayi' ku bayu' i kanatal. caledes ku demiad hamin a mihca. u siwkay nu kanatal u Chad sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 15 00 N, 19 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1.284 million km2 u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,259,200 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 24,800 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 11,852,462. kakalukan umah sa 39.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 9.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 51.30%. Chad masakaputay a kanatal , ngangan u Chad han, (u imi aca, A-la-buo a kamu, ō™ōīōßōĮ‚Äé TŇ°ńĀd; Fa-kou a kamu, Tchad /'t É√¶d/) nu Fay-cou tepanay lalabuay nu kanatal, nuamisan mitules tu Li-pi-ya nuwalian mitules tu Su-tan atu nu timulan nu Central african republic , satipan nutimulan nababiyaw tu Ce-may-lung, Nay-ci-li-ya, satipan atu Ni-zea kanatal u kalikeluhan, malikeluh. uyni u Chad a kakitizaan u tepan nu Fey-zou, mabatad ku bayu, paymihcaan caledes ku demiad, satu u lala' nu kanatal kakitizaan u likelikenan namin, sisa pangangan han tu "mapatayay a balucu' nu Fey-zou han". (u kamu nu Hulam sa: TŇ°ńĀd; ś≥ēŤ™ě:Tchad i/'t É√¶d/), ".) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u N'Djamena . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 11 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Mahamat D√©by, micakat a demiad sa i 1990 a mihca 12 bulad 2 demiad. u cunli nu Chad ayza sa ci Albert Pahimi Padack√©, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 26 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Chad sa, izaw ku tulu a kulit, u cunusay a semilaway, u cunusay a takuliway atu sumanahay. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: śü•Śĺ∑ u sulit nu Lipun: „ÉĀ„É£„ÉČŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilika: Chad laylay ayaw nu celah tu 7,000 a mihcaan, Chad nuwamisan a kakitizaan mulangaway mauzipay i hekal, mapadang ku nuenengay nu tademaw , satusa uynian ka kamihcaan i tiniay a kakitizaan saicelang malahat ku tademaw,Chad uyzaan kahenulan maazih ku kasumamadan nisubelidan , a tuud, angangan tuni i Bo-el-ku-en-ney-di-ti-be-se a kakitizaan) taneng talaayaw nu katukuh ayaw nu celah tu ayaw nu 2000 a mihcaan. namakay yayaw nu celah tu 7000 a mihcaan malingatu izaw tu sabelen sa ku tademaw i Chadan saupu sa nueneng, katukuh kakilul tu 9 a kasumamadan a mihcaan, kakilulkilul tu sakuwan i Chad nu Sa-ha-la a kakitizaan pakakat atu malawpes, uheni amin naemec milakuwit tunian a kakitizaan miawas tu Sa-ha-la a zazan nu sapaliwan tu tuud. Chad i 1920 a mihcan maala nu Fa-kuo, mala u Fa-kuo tungusay telecilal nu Fay-couan, 1960 a mihcaan, Chad i Fu-lang-suo-wa-tuo-mu-pa-pa-ye anikelidan makay Fa-kuo a misateked , nika Tuo-mu-ba-ba-ye a lalekuan malilid ku nuwamisanay a Mu-si-lin a kakitizaan caay katanengen , sazikuzay i 1965 a mihcaan sasacacay sa amabuwah tu katanaya nu ngangayaw nu lalabuay,1979 a mihcaan, mibelihay a cenbu tu hitay ami tebung tu En-cian-na, mapahezek tu nutimulan tunisakaku pikuwan. nika upabelihay tu cenbu u hitay mikeliday sakakaay a hitayan macaculi ku lalabuay, sazikuzay ci Hay-san-ha-pu-lel pakademec tu nika ngangayawan tahkal satu mala cung-tun,nika i1990 a mihcaan mapabelin nica ku sakakaay a hitay ci Yy-de-li-se-de-pi, 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, Su-tam satipan macacukah i a ci Ta-bu, satu Chad a lilis a kanatal caay katanektek ku kawaw nu kanatal. u hulic pabeli ci Chad tu cacay a sakuwan tu tabakiay nu a kawaw, cung-tung ci Chad u satalakaway nu mukeliday nu kanatal,situngus mikawaw tu cung-tung atu tabang a tademaw sakaput a tademaw nu mikawaway nu cence, pakay pahulicay miliclicay, u talakaway a hitay, kakatizaan a mikuwanay a tademaw atu kanatalay a u pabay nu pakusiay mikawaw tabaki ku ku kalilid . yu tabaki ku kakenuhan a kawaw, cung-tung i ku-min-i-huay amatatengil hawsa taneng amipasakamu tu mahiniay u kacenuhan sasakalahay a tukian a kawaw, Cung-tung u binawlan ku misingkiway lima a mihcacan mala cung-tung, 2005 a mihcaan Chad maawas ku baluhay a nupahulican, papiales tu nu cung-tung tulas kala cung-tungan. i ayaw cung-tung cinacacay dada' batilin kinacacay mala cung-tung, ci Te-bi a cung-tung u angangan u pipalitaan uyzaamin Za-cia-wa a tademaw ,uyzaamin makaiay a sakaput atu timulay paybinacadan i cenbu izawamin i cenbu daysiw, u maanubay i Chad a kanatal atumahiniay , mahapingan ku kitakit i 2005 a mihcaan patahkal tu tamelacay a nisulitan mucel kubalucu' nisulitan paazih Chad a kanatal i kitakit amin u maanubay a pihacengay a kanatal, , 2006 a mihcaan kahini adidi kunikasumat. Chad a hulic patizeng i Fa-kou a tademawan a hulic min-fa atu Chad tunu kasumamadan a hulic, zikuzan satu cayay tu kapipikuwan tu kapulungan a tunipisilut atu hulic paleca tu pidiput, kanahatu u hulic paaning tu Chad misadekeday a kawaw tunu huingay a hulic, nika hamin u kahenulan nu huing a hulic tademaw nu u cung-tung amin kusitungusay satalakaway a huing atu u cung-tung mikawaway. talakaway a huing atu pahulicay a wiy-yun-huay u Chad u satalakaway pasakaput nu huing a hulic , satalakaway a huing cacay a tademawan makay u sakakaay nu huing sakakaay nu huing atu nu zumaay a sakapuaa sabw lima ku tademaw, pakay sakaput a tademaw makay i Tung-tung atu kou-min huy-i ku situngusay, tahadikud ku kal Cung-tung a lekec. pahulicay a wiyen huy siwaay a tademaw ka pulung tu miliclicay, sawa ku kala Tung-tung, wiye huy izaw situngus tu hulic, katatelekan atu kitakit tu ni kakaletekan mikawaw taayaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. Chad maha u kananatal a nikenisan lasic tu 22 a kakitizaan, uynian a zazan i 2003 a mihcaan a kakitizaan a kasilacan a mikawaw, mikutay tu nuyanay tu a kenis tu sabaw sepat, paykakitizaan izaw amin ku cacay Tung-tung ku mikayawaw tu sakakaay nu mikelitay. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) hekal a lala' Chad malatulu ku mahapingan hekal lala' a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u Sa-ha-la-sa-mu a kakitizaan. tepanay a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan Su-tan nalinabuan a kakitizaan. Chad malalasid tu tuluay angangan nu hekal a lala' kenis, nuwamisan nu likelikenan a kakitizaan nu tunusay u caledesay likelikenan a demiad, tepanay makedal ku Sa-he-el a kakitizaan, tungusay caledesay nu nalinabuwan a demiad atu nutimulan u sidemekay nu Su-dan a nalinabuwan nalinabuwan a kakitizaan, tungusay a caledesay kilangkilangan a demiad, uynian a kanatal u Chad a taku a nupangangan kanatalay sakatalakaway a buyu' tini i Sa-ha-la a Cu-si a buyu', kahenulan a tuse atu satabakiay a tuse u En-cang-na. Chad a kanatal pulung malakuwi tu 200 nu binacadan, Fa-kuo a kamu atu A-la-po a kamu u kanatalay a kamu, Yi-se-lan-ciaw u sayadahay a singku nu tademaw. Chad yadah u masazumaay a binacadan a kamu, yadah ku kasumamadan nisubelid a lalangawan. Chad cenbu sapilisak patiyak tu cenbu sakalah micucuh tu kunuan kasumamadan atu lalangawan nu kanatal, patahekal tu nu Chad a kanatal piazihan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu Chad pasaupuan tu lalangawan . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .)
S.PHON: ¶ńßad ¶ńßad i afri ¶a a kanatar~…ĺ, u bunak amin i r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatajaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i afri ¶a". inaji Ē~ ° ku baju Ē~ ° i kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad ńßamin a mińß ¶a. u siwkaj nu kanatar~…ĺ u ¶ńßad sa i r~…ĺabu nu afri ¶a, itiza i ** ** n, ** ** …ô u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa *.*** mir~…ĺr~…ĺion km* u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa *,***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa **,*** km* ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa *.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. ¶ńßad masakaputaj a kanatar~…ĺ , ŇčaŇčan u ¶ńßad ńßan, (u imi a ¶a, a-r~…ĺa-buo a kamu, ***** t**d; fa-kou a kamu, t ¶ńßad / Ē~ °t**d/) nu faj- ¶ou t…ôpanaj r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, nuamisan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu r~…ĺi-pi-ja nuwar~…ĺian mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu su-tan atu nu timur~…ĺan nu ¶…ôntrar~…ĺ afri ¶an r…ôpubr~…ĺi ¶ , satipan nutimur~…ĺan nababijaw tu ¶…ô-maj-r~…ĺuŇč, naj- ¶i-r~…ĺi-ja, satipan atu ni-z…ôa kanatar~…ĺ u kar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan, mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß. ujni u ¶ńßad a kakitizaan u t…ôpan nu f…ô-zou, mabatad ku baju, pajmińß ¶aan ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad, satu u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ kakitizaan u r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan namin, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "mapatajaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu f…ô-zou ńßan". (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: t**d; **:t ¶ńßad i/ Ē~ °t**d/), ".) tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u n Ē~ °djam…ôna . kakininan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiniŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad ¶i ta-bu, satu ¶ńßad a r~…ĺir~…ĺis a kanatar~…ĺ ¶aaj katan…ôkt…ôk ku kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ. u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ¶ńßad tu ¶a ¶aj a sakuwan tu tabakiaj nu a kawaw, ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶ńßad u satar~…ĺakawaj nu muk…ôr~…ĺidaj nu kanatar~…ĺ,situŇčus mikawaw tu ¶uŇč-tuŇč atu tabaŇč a tad…ômaw sakaput a tad…ômaw nu mikawawaj nu ¶…ôn ¶…ô, pakaj pańßur~…ĺi ¶aj mir~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶aj, u tar~…ĺakawaj a ńßitaj, kakatizaan a mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw atu kanatar~…ĺaj a u pabaj nu pakusiaj mikawaw tabaki ku ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid . ju tabaki ku kak…ônuńßan a kawaw, ¶uŇč-tuŇč i ku-min-i-ńßuaj amatat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ńßawsa tan…ôŇč amipasakamu tu mańßiniaj u ka ¶…ônuńßan sasakar~…ĺańßaj a tukian a kawaw, ¶uŇč-tuŇč u binawr~…ĺan ku misiŇčkiwaj r~…ĺima a mińß ¶a ¶an mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan ¶ńßad maawas ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a nupańßur~…ĺi ¶an, papiar~…ĺ…ôs tu nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč tur~…ĺas kar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇčan. i ajaw ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶ina ¶a ¶aj dada Ē~ ° batir~…ĺin kina ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč, ¶i t…ô-bi a ¶uŇč-tuŇč u aŇčaŇčan u pipar~…ĺitaan ujzaamin za- ¶ia-wa a tad…ômaw ,ujzaamin makaiaj a sakaput atu timur~…ĺaj pajbina ¶adan i ¶…ônbu izawamin i ¶…ônbu dajsiw, u maanubaj i ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ atumańßiniaj , mańßapiŇčan ku kitakit i **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ tu tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a nisur~…ĺitan mu ¶…ôr~…ĺ kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nisur~…ĺitan paazińß ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ i kitakit amin u maanubaj a pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ, , **** a mińß ¶aan kańßini adidi kunikasumat. ¶ńßad a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ patiz…ôŇč i fa-kou a tad…ômawan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ min-fa atu ¶ńßad tunu kasumamadan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, zikuzan satu ¶ajaj tu kapipikuwan tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a tunipisir~…ĺut atu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ par~…ĺ…ô ¶a tu pidiput, kanańßatu u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ paaniŇč tu ¶ńßad misad…ôk…ôdaj a kawaw tunu ńßuiŇčaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, nika ńßamin u kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu ńßuiŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tad…ômaw nu u ¶uŇč-tuŇč amin kusituŇčusaj satar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč atu u ¶uŇč-tuŇč mikawawaj. tar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč atu pańßur~…ĺi ¶aj a wij-jun-ńßuaj u ¶ńßad u satar~…ĺakawaj pasakaput nu ńßuiŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ , satar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômawan makaj u sakakaaj nu ńßuiŇč sakakaaj nu ńßuiŇč atu nu zumaaj a sakapuaa sabw r~…ĺima ku tad…ômaw, pakaj sakaput a tad…ômaw makaj i tuŇč-tuŇč atu kou-min ńßuj-i ku situŇčusaj, tańßadikud ku kar~…ĺ ¶uŇč-tuŇč a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶. pańßur~…ĺi ¶aj a wij…ôn ńßuj siwaaj a tad…ômaw ka pur~…ĺuŇč tu mir~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶aj, sawa ku kar~…ĺa tuŇč-tuŇč, wij…ô ńßuj izaw situŇčus tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, katat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkan atu kitakit tu ni kakar~…ĺ…ôt…ôkan mikawaw taajaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. ¶ńßad mańßa u kananatar~…ĺ a nik…ônisan r~…ĺasi ¶ tu ** a kakitizaan, ujnian a zazan i **** a mińß ¶aan a kakitizaan a kasir~…ĺa ¶an a mikawaw, mikutaj tu nujanaj tu a k…ônis tu sabaw s…ôpat, pajkakitizaan izaw amin ku ¶a ¶aj tuŇč-tuŇč ku mikajawaw tu sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺitaj. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶ńßad mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu ku mańßapiŇčan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa-sa-mu a kakitizaan. t…ôpanaj a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan su-tan nar~…ĺinabuan a kakitizaan. ¶ńßad mar~…ĺar~…ĺasid tu tur~…ĺuaj aŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° k…ônis, nuwamisan nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a kakitizaan nu tunusaj u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a d…ômiad, t…ôpanaj mak…ôdar~…ĺ ku sa-ńß…ô-…ôr~…ĺ a kakitizaan, tuŇčusaj ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj nu nar~…ĺinabuwan a d…ômiad atu nutimur~…ĺan u sid…ôm…ôkaj nu su-dan a nar~…ĺinabuwan nar~…ĺinabuwan a kakitizaan, tuŇčusaj a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a d…ômiad, ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ u ¶ńßad a taku a nupaŇčaŇčan kanatar~…ĺaj sakatar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° tini i sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa a ¶u-si a buju Ē~ °, kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tus…ô atu satabakiaj a tus…ô u …ôn- ¶aŇč-na. ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺakuwi tu *** nu bina ¶adan, fa-kuo a kamu atu a-r~…ĺa-po a kamu u kanatar~…ĺaj a kamu, ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶iaw u sajadańßaj a siŇčku nu tad…ômaw. ¶ńßad jadańß u masazumaaj a bina ¶adan a kamu, jadańß ku kasumamadan nisub…ôr~…ĺid a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ¶ńßad ¶…ônbu sapir~…ĺisak patijak tu ¶…ônbu sakar~…ĺańß mi ¶u ¶uńß tu kunuan kasumamadan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kanatar~…ĺ, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nu ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ piazińßan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu ¶ńßad pasaupuan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .)
S.FORM: Chad Chad i Africa a kanatal, u bunak amin i labu nu kanatal, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatayay a balucu' i Africa". inayi' ku bayu' i kanatal. caledes ku demiad hamin a mihca. u siwkay nu kanatal u Chad sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 15 00 N, 19 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1.284 million km2 u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,259,200 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 24,800 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 11,852,462. kakalukan umah sa 39.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 9.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 51.30%. Chad masakaputay a kanatal , ngangan u Chad han, (u imi aca, A-la-buo a kamu, ō™ōīōßōĮ‚Äé TŇ°ńĀd; Fa-kou a kamu, Tchad /'t É√¶d/) nu Fay-cou tepanay lalabuay nu kanatal, nuamisan mitules tu Li-pi-ya nuwalian mitules tu Su-tan atu nu timulan nu Central african republic , satipan nutimulan nababiyaw tu Ce-may-lung, Nay-ci-li-ya, satipan atu Ni-zea kanatal u kalikeluhan, malikeluh. uyni u Chad a kakitizaan u tepan nu Fey-zou, mabatad ku bayu, paymihcaan caledes ku demiad, satu u lala' nu kanatal kakitizaan u likelikenan namin, sisa pangangan han tu "mapatayay a balucu' nu Fey-zou han". (u kamu nu Hulam sa: TŇ°ńĀd; ś≥ēŤ™ě:Tchad i/'t É√¶d/), ".) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u N'Djamena . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 11 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Mahamat D√©by, micakat a demiad sa i 1990 a mihca 12 bulad 2 demiad. u cunli nu Chad ayza sa ci Albert Pahimi Padack√©, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 26 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Chad sa, izaw ku tulu a kulit, u cunusay a semilaway, u cunusay a takuliway atu sumanahay. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: śü•Śĺ∑ u sulit nu Lipun: „ÉĀ„É£„ÉČŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilika: Chad laylay ayaw nu celah tu 7,000 a mihcaan, Chad nuwamisan a kakitizaan mulangaway mauzipay i hekal, mapadang ku nuenengay nu tademaw , satusa uynian ka kamihcaan i tiniay a kakitizaan saicelang malahat ku tademaw,Chad uyzaan kahenulan maazih ku kasumamadan nisubelidan , a tuud, angangan tuni i Bo-el-ku-en-ney-di-ti-be-se a kakitizaan) taneng talaayaw nu katukuh ayaw nu celah tu ayaw nu 2000 a mihcaan. namakay yayaw nu celah tu 7000 a mihcaan malingatu izaw tu sabelen sa ku tademaw i Chadan saupu sa nueneng, katukuh kakilul tu 9 a kasumamadan a mihcaan, kakilulkilul tu sakuwan i Chad nu Sa-ha-la a kakitizaan pakakat atu malawpes, uheni amin naemec milakuwit tunian a kakitizaan miawas tu Sa-ha-la a zazan nu sapaliwan tu tuud. Chad i 1920 a mihcan maala nu Fa-kuo, mala u Fa-kuo tungusay telecilal nu Fay-couan, 1960 a mihcaan, Chad i Fu-lang-suo-wa-tuo-mu-pa-pa-ye anikelidan makay Fa-kuo a misateked , nika Tuo-mu-ba-ba-ye a lalekuan malilid ku nuwamisanay a Mu-si-lin a kakitizaan caay katanengen , sazikuzay i 1965 a mihcaan sasacacay sa amabuwah tu katanaya nu ngangayaw nu lalabuay,1979 a mihcaan, mibelihay a cenbu tu hitay ami tebung tu En-cian-na, mapahezek tu nutimulan tunisakaku pikuwan. nika upabelihay tu cenbu u hitay mikeliday sakakaay a hitayan macaculi ku lalabuay, sazikuzay ci Hay-san-ha-pu-lel pakademec tu nika ngangayawan tahkal satu mala cung-tun,nika i1990 a mihcaan mapabelin nica ku sakakaay a hitay ci Yy-de-li-se-de-pi, 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, Su-tam satipan macacukah i a ci Ta-bu, satu Chad a lilis a kanatal caay katanektek ku kawaw nu kanatal. u hulic pabeli ci Chad tu cacay a sakuwan tu tabakiay nu a kawaw, cung-tung ci Chad u satalakaway nu mukeliday nu kanatal,situngus mikawaw tu cung-tung atu tabang a tademaw sakaput a tademaw nu mikawaway nu cence, pakay pahulicay miliclicay, u talakaway a hitay, kakatizaan a mikuwanay a tademaw atu kanatalay a u pabay nu pakusiay mikawaw tabaki ku ku kalilid . yu tabaki ku kakenuhan a kawaw, cung-tung i ku-min-i-huay amatatengil hawsa taneng amipasakamu tu mahiniay u kacenuhan sasakalahay a tukian a kawaw, Cung-tung u binawlan ku misingkiway lima a mihcacan mala cung-tung, 2005 a mihcaan Chad maawas ku baluhay a nupahulican, papiales tu nu cung-tung tulas kala cung-tungan. i ayaw cung-tung cinacacay dada' batilin kinacacay mala cung-tung, ci Te-bi a cung-tung u angangan u pipalitaan uyzaamin Za-cia-wa a tademaw ,uyzaamin makaiay a sakaput atu timulay paybinacadan i cenbu izawamin i cenbu daysiw, u maanubay i Chad a kanatal atumahiniay , mahapingan ku kitakit i 2005 a mihcaan patahkal tu tamelacay a nisulitan mucel kubalucu' nisulitan paazih Chad a kanatal i kitakit amin u maanubay a pihacengay a kanatal, , 2006 a mihcaan kahini adidi kunikasumat. Chad a hulic patizeng i Fa-kou a tademawan a hulic min-fa atu Chad tunu kasumamadan a hulic, zikuzan satu cayay tu kapipikuwan tu kapulungan a tunipisilut atu hulic paleca tu pidiput, kanahatu u hulic paaning tu Chad misadekeday a kawaw tunu huingay a hulic, nika hamin u kahenulan nu huing a hulic tademaw nu u cung-tung amin kusitungusay satalakaway a huing atu u cung-tung mikawaway. talakaway a huing atu pahulicay a wiy-yun-huay u Chad u satalakaway pasakaput nu huing a hulic , satalakaway a huing cacay a tademawan makay u sakakaay nu huing sakakaay nu huing atu nu zumaay a sakapuaa sabw lima ku tademaw, pakay sakaput a tademaw makay i Tung-tung atu kou-min huy-i ku situngusay, tahadikud ku kal Cung-tung a lekec. pahulicay a wiyen huy siwaay a tademaw ka pulung tu miliclicay, sawa ku kala Tung-tung, wiye huy izaw situngus tu hulic, katatelekan atu kitakit tu ni kakaletekan mikawaw taayaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. Chad maha u kananatal a nikenisan lasic tu 22 a kakitizaan, uynian a zazan i 2003 a mihcaan a kakitizaan a kasilacan a mikawaw, mikutay tu nuyanay tu a kenis tu sabaw sepat, paykakitizaan izaw amin ku cacay Tung-tung ku mikayawaw tu sakakaay nu mikelitay. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) hekal a lala' Chad malatulu ku mahapingan hekal lala' a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u Sa-ha-la-sa-mu a kakitizaan. tepanay a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan Su-tan nalinabuan a kakitizaan. Chad malalasid tu tuluay angangan nu hekal a lala' kenis, nuwamisan nu likelikenan a kakitizaan nu tunusay u caledesay likelikenan a demiad, tepanay makedal ku Sa-he-el a kakitizaan, tungusay caledesay nu nalinabuwan a demiad atu nutimulan u sidemekay nu Su-dan a nalinabuwan nalinabuwan a kakitizaan, tungusay a caledesay kilangkilangan a demiad, uynian a kanatal u Chad a taku a nupangangan kanatalay sakatalakaway a buyu' tini i Sa-ha-la a Cu-si a buyu', kahenulan a tuse atu satabakiay a tuse u En-cang-na. Chad a kanatal pulung malakuwi tu 200 nu binacadan, Fa-kuo a kamu atu A-la-po a kamu u kanatalay a kamu, Yi-se-lan-ciaw u sayadahay a singku nu tademaw. Chad yadah u masazumaay a binacadan a kamu, yadah ku kasumamadan nisubelid a lalangawan. Chad cenbu sapilisak patiyak tu cenbu sakalah micucuh tu kunuan kasumamadan atu lalangawan nu kanatal, patahekal tu nu Chad a kanatal piazihan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu Chad pasaupuan tu lalangawan . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .)
S.PHON: ¶ńßad ¶ńßad i afri ¶a a kanatar~…ĺ, u bunak amin i r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatajaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i afri ¶a". inaji Ē~ ° ku baju Ē~ ° i kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad ńßamin a mińß ¶a. u siwkaj nu kanatar~…ĺ u ¶ńßad sa i r~…ĺabu nu afri ¶a, itiza i ** ** n, ** ** …ô u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa *.*** mir~…ĺr~…ĺion km* u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa *,***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa **,*** km* ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa *.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. ¶ńßad masakaputaj a kanatar~…ĺ , ŇčaŇčan u ¶ńßad ńßan, (u imi a ¶a, a-r~…ĺa-buo a kamu, ***** t**d; fa-kou a kamu, t ¶ńßad / Ē~ °t**d/) nu faj- ¶ou t…ôpanaj r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, nuamisan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu r~…ĺi-pi-ja nuwar~…ĺian mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu su-tan atu nu timur~…ĺan nu ¶…ôntrar~…ĺ afri ¶an r…ôpubr~…ĺi ¶ , satipan nutimur~…ĺan nababijaw tu ¶…ô-maj-r~…ĺuŇč, naj- ¶i-r~…ĺi-ja, satipan atu ni-z…ôa kanatar~…ĺ u kar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan, mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß. ujni u ¶ńßad a kakitizaan u t…ôpan nu f…ô-zou, mabatad ku baju, pajmińß ¶aan ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad, satu u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ kakitizaan u r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan namin, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "mapatajaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu f…ô-zou ńßan". (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: t**d; **:t ¶ńßad i/ Ē~ °t**d/), ".) tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u n Ē~ °djam…ôna . kakininan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiniŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad ¶unr~…ĺi nu ¶ńßad ajza sa ¶i ar~…ĺb…ôrt pańßimi pada ¶k*, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u ńßata u kur~…ĺit nu ńßata nu ¶ńßad sa, izaw ku tur~…ĺu a kur~…ĺit, u ¶unusaj ¶i ta-bu, satu ¶ńßad a r~…ĺir~…ĺis a kanatar~…ĺ ¶aaj katan…ôkt…ôk ku kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ. u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ¶ńßad tu ¶a ¶aj a sakuwan tu tabakiaj nu a kawaw, ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶ńßad u ńßitaj, kakatizaan a mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw atu kanatar~…ĺaj a u pabaj nu pakusiaj mikawaw tabaki ku ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid . ju tabaki ku kak…ônuńßan a kawaw, ¶uŇč-tuŇč i ku-min-i-ńßuaj amatat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ńßawsa tan…ôŇč amipasakamu tu mańßiniaj u ka ¶…ônuńßan sasakar~…ĺańßaj a tukian a kawaw, ¶uŇč-tuŇč u binawr~…ĺan ku misiŇčkiwaj r~…ĺima a mińß ¶a ¶an mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan ¶ńßad maawas ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a nupańßur~…ĺi ¶an, papiar~…ĺ…ôs tu nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč tur~…ĺas kar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇčan. i ajaw ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶ina ¶a ¶aj dada Ē~ ° batir~…ĺin kina ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč, ¶i t…ô-bi a ¶uŇč-tuŇč u aŇčaŇčan u pipar~…ĺitaan ujzaamin za- ¶ia-wa a tad…ômaw ,ujzaamin makaiaj a sakaput atu timur~…ĺaj pajbina ¶adan i ¶…ônbu izawamin i ¶…ônbu dajsiw, u maanubaj i ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ atumańßiniaj , mańßapiŇčan ku kitakit i **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ tu tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a nisur~…ĺitan mu ¶…ôr~…ĺ kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nisur~…ĺitan paazińß ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ i kitakit amin u maanubaj a pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ, , **** a mińß ¶aan kańßini adidi kunikasumat. ¶ńßad a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ patiz…ôŇč i fa-kou a tad…ômawan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ min-fa atu ¶ńßad tunu kasumamadan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, zikuzan satu ¶ajaj tu kapipikuwan tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a tunipisir~…ĺut atu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ par~…ĺ…ô ¶a tu pidiput, kanańßatu u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ paaniŇč tu ¶ńßad misad…ôk…ôdaj a kawaw tunu ńßuiŇčaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, nika ńßamin u kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu ńßuiŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tad…ômaw nu u ¶uŇč-tuŇč amin kusituŇčusaj satar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč atu u ¶uŇč-tuŇč mikawawaj. tar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč atu pańßur~…ĺi ¶aj a wij-jun-ńßuaj u ¶ńßad u satar~…ĺakawaj pasakaput nu ńßuiŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ , satar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômawan makaj u sakakaaj nu ńßuiŇč sakakaaj nu ńßuiŇč atu nu zumaaj a sakapuaa sabw r~…ĺima ku tad…ômaw, pakaj sakaput a tad…ômaw makaj i tuŇč-tuŇč atu kou-min ńßuj-i ku situŇčusaj, tańßadikud ku kar~…ĺ ¶uŇč-tuŇč a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶. pańßur~…ĺi ¶aj a wij…ôn ńßuj siwaaj a tad…ômaw ka pur~…ĺuŇč tu mir~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶aj, sawa ku kar~…ĺa tuŇč-tuŇč, wij…ô ńßuj izaw situŇčus tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, katat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkan atu kitakit tu ni kakar~…ĺ…ôt…ôkan mikawaw taajaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. ¶ńßad mańßa u kananatar~…ĺ a nik…ônisan r~…ĺasi ¶ tu ** a kakitizaan, ujnian a zazan i **** a mińß ¶aan a kakitizaan a kasir~…ĺa ¶an a mikawaw, mikutaj tu nujanaj tu a k…ônis tu sabaw s…ôpat, pajkakitizaan izaw amin ku ¶a ¶aj tuŇč-tuŇč ku mikajawaw tu sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺitaj. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶ńßad mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu ku mańßapiŇčan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa-sa-mu a kakitizaan. t…ôpanaj a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan su-tan nar~…ĺinabuan a kakitizaan. ¶ńßad mar~…ĺar~…ĺasid tu tur~…ĺuaj aŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° k…ônis, nuwamisan nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a kakitizaan nu tunusaj u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a d…ômiad, t…ôpanaj mak…ôdar~…ĺ ku sa-ńß…ô-…ôr~…ĺ a kakitizaan, tuŇčusaj ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj nu nar~…ĺinabuwan a d…ômiad atu nutimur~…ĺan u sid…ôm…ôkaj nu su-dan a nar~…ĺinabuwan nar~…ĺinabuwan a kakitizaan, tuŇčusaj a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a d…ômiad, ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ u ¶ńßad a taku a nupaŇčaŇčan kanatar~…ĺaj sakatar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° tini i sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa a ¶u-si a buju Ē~ °, kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tus…ô atu satabakiaj a tus…ô u …ôn- ¶aŇč-na. ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺakuwi tu *** nu bina ¶adan, fa-kuo a kamu atu a-r~…ĺa-po a kamu u kanatar~…ĺaj a kamu, ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶iaw u sajadańßaj a siŇčku nu tad…ômaw. ¶ńßad jadańß u masazumaaj a bina ¶adan a kamu, jadańß ku kasumamadan nisub…ôr~…ĺid a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ¶ńßad ¶…ônbu sapir~…ĺisak patijak tu ¶…ônbu sakar~…ĺańß mi ¶u ¶uńß tu kunuan kasumamadan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kanatar~…ĺ, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nu ¶ńßad a kanatar~…ĺ piazińßan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu ¶ńßad pasaupuan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .)
